title: althaea karsiana
intro: Althaea karsiana, also known as the Australian marshmallow or swamp mallow, is a perennial herb belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, making it beneficial for skin issues, wounds, and digestive problems. The plant's root and leaves can be used to prepare herbal remedies, including decoctions, infusions, and salves, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Althaea karsiana is also used to treat gastrointestinal issues, such as ulcers and irritable bowel syndrome, due to its mucilaginous properties, which help protect and soothe the digestive tract.
